reviews.review_description: Loved this game on PS4 and now it’s in VR for free! So great to see these developers are interested in VR, hope they do more stuff in the future !
The games great and the flips are so fun to do

The game has two modes: one is about getting more and more difficult from map to map and the other is to fight against about 10 flying bots.The controls are very good and easy to use. New content would be nice!

reviews.review_title: Very nice game, really fun! I love it!!!
reviews.review_description: Very nice  game, you can use all your tricks as gamer combat pilot, much action than I expected, survival mode is amazing. It is a game difficult to keep far away once you start to play  for sure, i love it, great job!!!
Is a really good game add a joystick
